identity.title: Brooms in the Boiler Room
identity.styleSentence: A frantic 100 BPM dark orchestral jazz rap track blending gritty 90s East Coast boom bap drum breaks with dramatic strings, ominous bassoons, prominent oboe lines, and marching broomstick percussion to create a Halloween noir cartoon atmosphere that feels both raw and dangerously playful.
identity.vocalStyle: Aggressive raspy male rap duo with crazy street-cartoon vocals

lyrics.text:
[Intro - Old Film Projector, Wizard Tower]

[film reel clicking]
[thunder rolling]
[low bassoon riff]
[staccato strings creeping]

Voice 1 - Raspy:
Ayo...

Voice 1:
Don’t touch that hat.

Voice 2 - Crazy Whisper:
Heh... too late.

Both:
Brooms in the boiler room.

[Chorus - Raspy Gang Chant]

Brooms in the boiler room,
water starts to rise,
little mouse grinning with the stars in his eyes.

Brooms in the boiler room,
knocking at the door,
spell got loose and it hungry for more.

Black-and-white world,
but the money still gold,
whole tower shaking when the wild drums roll.

Brooms in the boiler room,
moon turned blue,
one wrong spell and the whole crew doomed.

[Verse 1 - Rapper 1 - Raspy, Unhinged]

I came through small with the hat pulled low,
stars on the brim and the gloves still glow.

Strings go stab,
bassoon go low,

broom got a bucket and it march like woah.

Told me don’t touch,
so I touched that quick,

now the whole tower sick and the floorboards shift.

One broom, two brooms,
three more rise,

black ink magic in the cartoon eyes.

Timpani boom when the stairwell crack,

oboe line howlin’ and the shadows clap back.

Moonlight bends when the wand goes snap,

shadow on the wall with a long-eared cap.

I ain’t scared,
I’m just deep in the trick,

too much power for a little dude slick.

Black-and-white frame,
but the gold still gleam,

money in the fog and the magic in steam.

[Pre-Chorus - Call and Response]

Voice 1:
Who cast that?

Voice 2:
Not me.

Voice 1:
Who touched the hat?

Voice 2:
Not me.

Voice 1:
Who flooded the room?

Voice 2:
Couldn’t be me.

Both:
Then why the broom got a whole army?

[Chorus - Raspy Gang Chant]

Brooms in the boiler room,
water starts to rise,
little mouse grinning with the stars in his eyes.

Brooms in the boiler room,
knocking at the door,
spell got loose and it hungry for more.

Black-and-white world,
but the money still gold,
whole tower shaking when the wild drums roll.

Brooms in the boiler room,
moon turned blue,
one wrong spell and the whole crew doomed.

[Verse 2 - Rapper 2 - Raspy, Crazed]

I seen the mop grow teeth in the midnight haze,

seen buckets pour rivers through a hundred stairways.

Woodwinds laughing,
trumpets go crooked,

whole magic tower looking haunted and flooded.

Old wizard gone,
but the hat stayed watching,

every little sparkle turned toxic.

Broomstick army with the wooden-leg stomp,

tap dance terror when the bassline thump.

I told little homie,
“You don’t know that spell.”

He said,
“I know enough to make the whole room swell.”

Then the strings start chasing,
ceiling got eyes,

stars in the robe started falling from the sky.

Cauldron bubble,
floorboards split,

one more chant and the whole place flipped.

Magic ain’t cute when the shadows get tall,

especially when the mouse got control of it all.

[Bridge - Orchestral Breakdown]

[beat cuts]
[low bassoon]
[staccato strings]
[timpani hits]
[water rushing]
[brooms marching]

Voice 1 - Raspy:
They said he was just an apprentice.

Voice 2 - Laughing:
Apprentice?

Voice 1:
Yeah.

Voice 2:
Then why the broom saluting him?

[evil cartoon laugh]

Both:
Brooms...
in the boiler room.

[Verse 3 - Trading Bars]

Voice 1:
Hat too big.

Voice 2:
Spell too strong.

Voice 1:
Broom too wild.

Voice 2:
Night too long.

Voice 1:
Water too high.

Voice 2:
Door won’t move.

Voice 1:
Whole tower drowning.

Voice 2:
Still in groove.

Voice 1:
Strings go sharp.

Voice 2:
Bassoon go doom.

Voice 1:
Timpani hit.

Voice 2:
Oboes fill the room.

Voice 1:
One little mouse.

Voice 2:
Big mistake.

Voice 1:
One little wand.

Voice 2:
Whole world shake.

Both:
Black-and-white world but the money still gold,
whole crew slipping while the spell takes hold.

No crown, no throne,
just a hat and a grin,

then the broomsticks rise and the nightmare begins.

[Final Chorus - Bigger Raspy Gang Chant]

Brooms in the boiler room,
water starts to rise,
little mouse grinning with the stars in his eyes.

Brooms in the boiler room,
knocking at the door,
spell got loose and it hungry for more.

Black-and-white world,
but the money still gold,
whole tower shaking when the wild drums roll.

Brooms in the boiler room,
moon turned blue,
one wrong spell and the whole crew doomed.

Brooms in the boiler room,
still marching,
still stomping,
still pouring,
still watching.

[Outro - Old Film Ending]

[orchestra fades]
[water drains slowly]
[broomstick scrape]
[one final magic chime]

Voice 2:
You think it’s over?

Voice 1:
Nah.

Voice 2:
Why?

Voice 1:
The hat still glowing.

[film reel snaps]

analysis.summary: A dark, noir-infused narrative where a magical spell goes awry in an old tower, turning innocent cleaning tools into a terrifying army that floods the room and chases down power-hungry greed.

sections.name: Intro
sections.emotion: Inquisitive unease, sudden realization of wrongness

sections.name: Chorus
sections.emotion: Full-blown disaster with frantic, cartoonish horror

sections.name: Verse 1
sections.emotion: Narrative tension with a sense of slippery inevitability

sections.name: Pre-Chorus
sections.emotion: Building panic and the toxic shift in atmosphere

sections.name: Verse 2
sections.emotion: Resigned acceptance of doom amidst rising chaos

sections.name: Bridge
sections.emotion: Hypnotic dread and the final realization that help is impossible

keywords.imageryPrompt: A glowing rune floating in smoky steam, cracking like glass as it expands into a jagged mouth with sharp teeth.
An endless spiraling tower of rusted pipes and bubbling cauldrons flooding upward, walls melting into black ink water.

keywords.emotion: Uncanny valley transformation to weaponized tools
keywords.imageryPrompt: Traditional straw brooms with skeletal hands gripping their handles, marching in unison across wet floorboards leaving dark trails behind them.

keywords.emotion: Corrupting allure of wealth amidst decay
keywords.imageryPrompt: A single beam of bright yellow light cutting through a pitch-black void, illuminating piles of coins that look like teeth rather than currency.
A small rodent wearing oversized wizard robes, standing on its hind legs with a wide grin reflecting the stars in its eyes while holding a staff made of bones.

keywords.emotion: Overwhelming structural collapse and drowning fear
keywords.imageryPrompt: A crumbling skyscraper structure dissolving into water, shadows stretching unnaturally long against the walls as gravity seems to reverse.

dropMap.hint: cuts → blackout/cut-mode moments; risers → supernova build-ups (stemSense activeCut/activeRiser fire these automatically)

full show: merge analysis+interactions into tracks.planet; lyrics_synced from transcript words
